response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song 1 ('Haruarashi') by searching the lyric line '胸を打つ音楽で僕ら春風'. 2. Identified song 2 ('FG ROADSTER') via explicit on-screen text. 3. Used keyword-based searches to retrieve Japanese and English lyrics for both tracks. 4. Verified the performers as FLOW GLOW members from Hololive.
response.global_summary: A karaoke session featuring VTubers from FLOW GLOW performing two songs: 'Haruarashi' and 'FG ROADSTER'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 胸を打つ音楽で僕ら春風\n音に聞く晴るの風\nさぁこの歌よ風げ！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: With music that strikes the chest, we are the spring breeze. The spring breeze heard in the sound. Come, blow this song away!

scenes.description: VTubers performing 'FG ROADSTER' with on-screen lyrics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
搭載V8エンジン
第7感持ってる原人
6するこの世界と全人類
この5人でゲームをチェンジ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Equipped with a V8 engine. A primitive man with the 7th sense. Six ways to Sunday, the world will be rocking. With us five, the game is changed.
